title: Cloud: parity for natural-language discover (agents/query or equivalent)
Cloud Run cih-api: mount Secret Manager CIH_CLOUD_RESEND_API_KEY as env + verify magic-link email
description: IAM secretAccessor already granted via Terraform when resend_secret_id set. Cloud Run must reference secret as env CIH_CLOUD_RESEND_API_KEY. Set production CIH_CLOUD_* (DB, secrets, CORS, ENVIRONMENT).

title: Local: wire watched folders + background watcher at startup
Cover cloud FastAPI route imports in tests (catch NameError at startup)
description: PR #10 (3dbb53d) introduced cloud/api/routes/auth.py references to logging / send_magic_link_email / cloud_settings without imports. CI passed because cloud/tests/* never imports the FastAPI route modules. Add a smoke test that does 'from api.app import app' (or imports each routes/* module) so any future missing-import regression is caught before deploy.

title: Set CIH_CLOUD_MAGIC_LINK_APP_BASE_URL for one-click sign-in in magic-link emails
description: Magic-link emails currently include only the raw token (no clickable Sign-In button) because magic_link_app_base_url is unset on cih-api-prod. Decide on the target URL (Electron deep link with custom scheme, or hosted web build), then 'gcloud run services update cih-api-prod --update-env-vars=CIH_CLOUD_MAGIC_LINK_APP_BASE_URL=...'.

title: Cloud: send magic links via transactional email (SES/SendGrid/Postmark)
Land feat/resend-magic-link-email — merge PR, CI green
description: PR ~10: Resend magic link + Terraform IAM + recovery docs. Rebase if needed; merge to main after review.

title: GCP: finish prod apply — Artifact Registry images, Cloud Run cih-api/cih-worker, Tasks queue
description: Partial Terraform apply: SQL+bucket+secrets+Resend IAM succeeded. Fix 409 queue (import google_cloud_tasks_queue.jobs[0] OR manage_cloud_tasks_queue=false). Build/push us-docker.pkg.dev/PROJECT/cih/cih-api:latest and cih-worker:latest (see infra/gcp/README.md). Delete broken Run revisions if needed. Apply again.

title: Rotate weak CIH_CLOUD_MAGIC_LINK_SECRET / CIH_CLOUD_SESSION_SECRET on cih-api-prod
description: Current values 'prod-magic-secret' / 'prod-session-secret' pass the production guardrail (which only rejects the literal dev defaults) but are still weak/predictable. Generate strong random values, store in Secret Manager (CIH_CLOUD_MAGIC_LINK_SECRET / CIH_CLOUD_SESSION_SECRET), then 'gcloud run services update cih-api-prod --update-secrets=...:latest'. Note: rotating session_secret invalidates all existing sessions.

title: Auto-deploy cih-api / cih-worker on push to main
description: Today main pushes are not deployed automatically — someone has to run 'gcloud builds submit' + 'gcloud run deploy' by hand. This is how the auth.py NameError sat undeployed for ~3 hours after PR #10 merged. Add a GitHub Action (or Cloud Build trigger) that on push to main rebuilds both images with both ':live' and ':<sha>' tags and rolls out cih-api-prod + cih-worker-prod.
